text:
Created attachment 244146
Notes following an upgrade to packages and a restart of the OS

(In reply to Graham Perrin ◐ from comment #20)

No longer crashing. 

A lazy guess: maybe bug 272042, or something nearby, was the block. 

Read the notes attached here alongside <https://bz-attachments.freebsd.org/attachment.cgi?id=244145> from 272042, in particular: 

> … remmina upgraded: 1.4.30 -> 1.4.30_1
